title: SDIP Bundle Manifest
description: Identity, version, license, and integrity manifest for a Sovereign Doctrinal Inference Protocol bundle.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for tooling.

tradition_id.description: Lowercase namespace identifier for the tradition under the publisher's control.

language_primary.description: Primary language of the backbone and the unannotated corpus (BCP 47 short form).

languages.description: All languages with translations available in i18n/translations/.

license_corpus.description: SPDX license identifier for the corpus and backbone content.

license_harness.description: SPDX license identifier for the bundled harness (typically AGPL-3.0-or-later).

license_spec.description: SPDX license identifier for the specification (typically CC-BY-4.0).

public_key.description: Publisher's signing public key (PEM, age, or other). OPTIONAL at v0.1, REQUIRED at v0.2.

publisher_signature.description: Detached signature over backbone + corpus + glossary + calibrations. OPTIONAL at v0.1.

backbone_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of backbone.md (after frontmatter, body only).

corpus_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of a deterministic Merkle root over the corpus/ directory.

spec_url.description: URL of the protocol specification this bundle conforms to.

bundle_url.description: Canonical distribution URL of this bundle. Recommended for practitioner-initiated updates.

published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the bundle's publication.

previous_version.description: The version this bundle supersedes. Recommended for upgrade-path discovery.
